title: eleocharis montevidensis var. bolanderi
intro: Eleocharis montevidensis var. bolanderi, also known as Bolander's spike-rush, is a perennial aquatic plant that belongs to the sedge family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory compounds. The plant's health benefits are attributed to its ability to soothe irritated mucous membranes, reduce congestion, and alleviate symptoms associated with colds and flu. In herbal preparations, Bolander's spike-rush is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its effectiveness and safety have not been extensively scientifically studied.
